name: Logo: Add Library: Check of sorting libraries
fullName: Manage Libraries: Logo: Add Library: Check of sorting libraries

steps.name: When  I add "Palace Bookshelf" account from welcomeScreen
And  I add libraries by the logo:
When  I tap the logo on catalog screen
Then  The sorting of 'amountKey' libraries is alphabetical on find your library screen
When  I tap cancel button on find your library screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Logo: Add Library: Check of sorting libraries

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Logo: Add Library: Check of sorting libraries
